sub_modules.dct1d_8_matrix_dot: Combinational fixed-point 8-tap matrix dot-product for DCT/IDCT coefficient generation using Q2.14 constants.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM for the orthonormal 8-point DCT matrix and its transpose for IDCT mode.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_saturate: Combinational signed saturation from wide accumulator results to OUT_W.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_idct_replay: Combinational replay path for reconstructed samples in the system testbench IDCT pass after DCT coefficient truncation.
